hero.headline: Your notes,
hero.subtitle: Notes World brings your ideas, tasks, and reminders into one clean, fast app. Tag everything, find anything, stay on top of it all.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't

tags.title: Tags
tags.desc: Organise anything with colour-coded tags. Filter your dashboard by tag in one click.

types.title: Four item types
types.desc: Notes, Tasks, Ideas, and Reminders — each with its own view and workflow.

capture.title: Quick capture
capture.desc: A persistent capture bar means you can jot anything down without losing your place.

import.title: Import & export
import.desc: Bring notes in from other apps or export everything as markdown — your data is always yours.

mobile.title: Mobile app
mobile.desc: Native Android app via Expo. Capture notes on the go, fully synced with the web app.

dark.title: Dark by default
dark.desc: Built for long sessions. A clean dark interface that's easy on the eyes.
